solution_criteria: Meal plan should include high protein intake (1.6-2.2g per kg body weight), caloric surplus of 300-500 calories, distributed across 4-5 meals with balanced macronutrients
Meal plan should provide caloric deficit of 300-500 calories, minimum 1.2g protein per kg body weight from plant sources, include whole grains and legumes, with 3 meals and 1-2 snacks

Meal plan should include adequate carbohydrates for glycogen replenishment, complete proteins at each meal, anti-inflammatory foods, scheduled around training time, with focus on hydration and 4-5 balanced meals totaling maintenance calories
